attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who sits on others' attacks then uses superior sprint to win from small groups. Prefers to conserve energy and finish over initiating sustained efforts.
team_tactics: Minimal team support visible; operates as solo operator in breakaways, relying on intelligent positioning rather than domestique-led setups.
terrain_preference: Single-climb stages and breakaway scenarios where he can mark attacks then out-sprint weakened climbers. Strong enough to sustain solo efforts when needed but prefers tactical group finishes.
vulnerability: GC teams allow him excessive freedom when 11+ minutes down, suggesting he's not rated as dangerous on multi-climb or sustained GC efforts. Tendency to sit on wheels may limit options when forced to lead.
key_patterns: Consistently sits on attacks then wins sprint: evidenced 3 times vs PINOT and THOMAS
Allowed in breaks at 11+ minutes GC gap, teams don't consider serious threat
Tactical maturity shown in conserving energy over animating race in breakaways
Capable of solo efforts when required but prefers reactive tactical racing
form_trajectory: positive: Multiple 2023 wins showing improved tactical execution and ability to convert breakaway opportunities into victories
